figures.caption: Fig. 3. Results. (A) Confusion matrices for H&E and SIM domains comparing UNI and SIMPLER. (B) Qualitative heatmap comparison of attention scores.

Fig. 4. Clustering results.(A) Representative patches from two clusters identified by SIMPLER show consistent structure. (B) Cluster maps using UNI (middle) and SIMPLER (bottom). SIMPLER achieves strong cross-modal consistency

Fig. 2. SIMPLER Overview. The proposed progressive cross-modality curriculum used to align H&E and SIM representations. Each stage introduces increasingly structured alignment constraints, from feature robustness to structural cross-reconstruction.
